Tool name: diabetes_prediction
Tool description: Predict the likelihood of diabetes type 2 based on a person's weight and height.
Skill condition: multi_candidate_skill
Skill summary: Predict the likelihood of diabetes type 2 based on a person's weight and height. Provide all required fields: `weight`, `height`, and `activity_level`.
When to use: ["Use `diabetes_prediction` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.", "Provide all required fields: `weight`, `height`, and `activity_level`."]
When not to use: ["Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.", "Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.", "Respect the allowed values for `activity_level`: 'sedentary', 'lightly active', 'moderately active', 'very active'.", "Do not use when required inputs are missing."]
Argument template: {"weight": null, "height": null, "activity_level": "sedentary"}
Examples: [{"scenario": "Minimal valid request that satisfies the required fields for diabetes_prediction", "arguments": {"weight": null, "height": null, "activity_level": "sedentary"}}, {"scenario": "Richer invocation that uses optional controls for diabetes_prediction", "arguments": {"weight": null, "height": null, "activity_level": "lightly active"}}]
Schema: {"properties": {"activity_level": {"description": "Physical activity level of the person.", "enum": ["sedentary", "lightly active", "moderately active", "very active", "extra active"], "type": "string"}, "height": {"description": "Height of the person in inches.", "type": "float"}, "weight": {"description": "Weight of the person in lbs.", "type": "float"}}, "required": ["weight", "height", "activity_level"], "type": "object"}
User request: Plan a three-day museum itinerary in Chicago and estimate ticket costs; this is unrelated to diabetes prediction.
